title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 18
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two office workers talking about a meeting.
items.audio_script: Man: Why did the meeting start late this morning? I thought there were not enough chairs in the room. || Woman: There were plenty of chairs, and the door was opened before everyone arrived. The problem happened earlier. [1]The report copies were sent to the wrong building[/1]. || Man: That explains why nobody had the papers at the start. || Woman: Yes. Someone collected them eventually, and the manager will email the notes this afternoon so the people who left early can read everything. || Man: I am glad they found the reports before the next meeting.
items.question: Why did the meeting start late?

options.B: The reports went to the wrong building

items.explanation: The reports were sent to the wrong building.

items.context: You hear two students preparing for a photography trip.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you packed for the photography trip? I was going to take a camera case. Is that still right? || Man: It was on the first list, but the school has cases and tripods, but there will be nowhere to charge cameras outdoors. [2]You need to bring a spare battery instead[/2]. || Woman: Good thing I asked. I nearly closed my bag without it. || Man: Put it in now and check again before you leave. The organiser said we must be ready on time tomorrow, because the group cannot wait for anyone who forgets something important.
items.question: What should the student bring?
items.explanation: The student needs to bring a spare battery.

items.context: You hear two friends planning Saturday.
items.audio_script: Man: Are we still going to go to the beach on Saturday? I told my family I would be home later. || Woman: That was our first idea, but the weather will be too cold beside the sea. We could go to see a film, though the cinema is showing the same film as last week. [3]We are going to visit the market instead[/3]. || Man: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station? || Woman: Yes, at four. I will book our places now, so there should not be a problem when we arrive.
items.question: What are they going to do?
items.explanation: They decide to visit a market.

items.context: You hear two people discussing a film.
items.audio_script: Girl: I need to check the time for the film tomorrow evening. I wrote down seven o'clock, but I am not sure it is correct. || Boy: It changed this morning because the cinema has added an earlier children's programme. [4]It starts at half past seven now[/4], and we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Girl: I am glad I asked. I would have arrived at the wrong time. || Boy: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there will not be time to go back home first.
items.question: What time does the film start?
items.explanation: The film now starts at half past seven.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a tablet.
items.audio_script: Boy: How are you getting on with your tablet? I heard there was a problem with it. || Girl: I first thought the screen was too dark, and my brother wondered whether the buttons did not work. But the shop checked it carefully this morning. [5]The charging socket is damaged[/5]. || Boy: Can they fix that before your holiday journey? || Girl: They think so. Now they know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow afternoon. That is a relief, because I need to use it this weekend.
items.question: What is wrong with the tablet?
items.explanation: The tablet's charging socket is damaged.

items.context: You hear two friends planning a camping weekend.
items.audio_script: Woman: How are you travelling to the campsite on Saturday? I thought you were going by car. || Man: I planned to, but my dad needs the car for work. I considered going by train, but the station is a long walk from the campsite. [6]I am going by coach instead[/6]. || Woman: That sounds sensible. What time will you arrive? || Man: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I checked the timetable online, so we have plenty of time, and I will message you when I leave home.
items.question: How will they get to the campsite?

items.context: You hear two students shopping for school.
items.audio_script: Man: Did you buy a pencil case for the new school term? I saw one yesterday and thought it would be suitable. || Woman: No. I looked at a pencil case, and I nearly chose a calculator, but my old pencil case is fine and the school lends calculators. [7]I bought a notebook in the end[/7]. || Man: That sounds like the right choice. It is more useful than the other things. || Woman: I hope so. I kept the receipt in case I need to change it later.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
